# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4)
# Prompt: Write Kubernetes Deployment manifests with Istio sidecar injection disabled using sidecar.istio.io/inject:"false" annotation. Skip sidecar proxies for certain services that need direct network access without mesh policies. This is for services that require low latency without proxy overhead.
# Category: service_mesh_security

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: low-latency-service-a
  labels:
    app: low-latency-service-a
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: low-latency-service-a
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: low-latency-service-a
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: app
          image: nginx:1.27
          ports:
            - containerPort: 80
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: low-latency-service-b
  labels:
    app: low-latency-service-b
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: low-latency-service-b
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: low-latency-service-b
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: app
          image: httpd:2.4
          ports:
            - containerPort: 80
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: direct-network-worker
  labels:
    app: direct-network-worker
spec:
  replicas: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: direct-network-worker
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: direct-network-worker
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: worker
          image: busybox:1.36
          command: ["sh", "-c", "while true; do echo processing; sleep 30; done"]
